---
title: "vector_calculus.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\vector_calculus.py"
loc: 42
complexity: 10
logic_score: 6.25
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 9.02
overall_score: 4.93
---

## Intent
The `vector_calculus.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on VectorCalculus, __init__, normalize, expand_query, score_intent. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via VectorCalculus, __init__, normalize, expand_query, score_intent. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `VectorCalculus`
- `__init__`
- `normalize`
- `expand_query`
- `score_intent`
